description: timberland shows off its sartorial experimentation in these high top shoes referenced from the classic yacht shoes. The soft upper and rugged styling make this shoe a love-forever classic. Give your off-duty staples a fresh twist with these shoes!UpperHigh-top leather upper with strategically placed overlay at the heelBrand badge on the lateral side of the heelCentral lace ups for a snug FitPadded tongue for cushioned comfortPadded insole for in-step comfortContrast stitch detail on hte seams of the toe box MidsoleRubber midsole for cushioningOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heelAggressive lugs at the fore foot and heelShoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
